deblur.positive: sharp focus, crisp details, clear edges, deblurred, high definition, fine texture, photorealistic
deblur.negative: blur, motion blur, out of focus, soft, hazy, noise, artifacts

relight_night.positive: nighttime, dark sky, street lights, shop lights, neon glow, artificial lighting, realistic night shadows, photorealistic
relight_night.negative: daylight, bright sunlight, overexposed, added objects, extra people, distortion

object_insert_fire.positive: fire on the ground, realistic flames, warm firelight, light smoke, glowing embers, photorealistic
object_insert_fire.negative: extra fires, no fire, changed people, added objects, unrealistic flames, distortion

normalize.positive: clean photo, neutral natural colors, balanced exposure, color corrected, even sharpness, photorealistic
normalize.negative: color cast, overexposed, underexposed, stylized filter, artifacts, distortion

change_clothing.positive: different outfit, new clothing, dark winter coat, jeans, changed clothes, photorealistic
change_clothing.negative: same outfit, changed face, changed pose, changed body, changed background, added people, distortion
